description: Add comprehensive tests for all new observability modules, plus infrastructure YAML SLO definitions and runbook documentation files.
steps: Create packages/observability/src/__tests__/instrument.test.ts - Test the @instrument() decorator: verify it creates spans for sync methods, async methods, records error spans on thrown exceptions, handles method arguments as span attributes, respects decorator options (custom span name).

Create packages/observability/src/__tests__/otel-setup.test.ts - Test OTelSetup class: verify setup() initializes tracer/metrics/logger, Fastify auto-instrumentation hook creates request spans, Prisma hook creates query spans, shutdown() cleans up resources.

Create packages/observability/src/__tests__/slo-definitions.test.ts - Test ServiceSLODefinitions: verify all 9 services have SLO configs, parseSLOConfig validates correct configs, parseSLOConfig rejects invalid configs (target > 1, missing fields), each service has availability and latency SLOs.

Create packages/observability/src/__tests__/slo-burn-rate.test.ts - Test BurnRateCalculator: verify burn rate calculation with known event sequences, detectBudgetExhaustion returns true when budget is consumed, getTimeToExhaustion returns correct estimate, fast/slow window alerting triggers correctly.

Create packages/observability/src/__tests__/chaos-experiments.test.ts - Test ChaosExperimentRunner: verify networkDelay creates a latency experiment and inject causes delay, podKill creates a kill experiment, verifySteadyState validates hypotheses after experiment, timeout handling works when delay exceeds threshold.

Create packages/observability/src/__tests__/runbook-generator.test.ts - Test RunbookGenerator: verify generateRunbook produces markdown with required sections (Description, Impact, Detection, Investigation, Remediation, Escalation), generateAllRunbooks covers all services, different alert types produce different content.

Create packages/observability/src/__tests__/synthetic-monitor.test.ts - Test SyntheticMonitor: verify addProbe registers a probe, runProbe executes health check and returns result, defineJourney creates multi-step journey, journey reports pass/fail per step with latency.

Create packages/observability/src/__tests__/dashboard-config.test.ts - Test DashboardConfigGenerator: verify generateServiceDashboard returns valid Grafana JSON structure with panels, generateOverviewDashboard includes all services, panels have correct gridPos layout.

Create packages/observability/src/__tests__/pagerduty-integration.test.ts - Test PagerDutyIntegration: verify createIncident returns incident with correct severity, resolveIncident updates state, routeAlert directs to correct service, webhook payload matches PagerDuty Events API v2 format.

Create packages/observability/infra/slo/ directory with YAML SLO definition files: quantmail.yml, quantube.yml, quantsync.yml, quantgram.yml, quantcast.yml, quantdocs.yml, quantdrive.yml, quantforum.yml, quantmarket.yml. Each file defines availability_slo (target: 0.999), latency_p95_slo (target: 0.95, threshold_ms: 200), latency_p99_slo (target: 0.99, threshold_ms: 500), error_budget (window_days: 30).

Create packages/observability/docs/runbooks/ directory with runbook markdown files: high-error-rate.md, high-latency.md, budget-exhaustion.md, pod-crash-loop.md, memory-pressure.md. Each runbook follows the template structure: Title, Description, Severity, Impact, Detection, Investigation Steps, Remediation Steps, Escalation Path, Related Dashboards.
acceptance_criteria: All test files pass: NODE_OPTIONS="" npx vitest run packages/observability/src/__tests__/
@instrument() decorator creates valid OTel spans (test proves span is created and ended)
SLO definitions parse correctly for all 9 services (test validates each)
Burn rate calculator detects budget exhaustion correctly (test with 100% failure rate)
Chaos experiment: inject delay then verify timeout handling (test proves delay occurs)
Synthetic monitor: health check passes for simulated running service (test proves pass result)
infra/slo/ contains 9 YAML files with valid structure
docs/runbooks/ contains 5 runbook markdown files with required sections
verification: Run: NODE_OPTIONS="" npx vitest run packages/observability/src/__tests__/
Verify infra/slo/ YAML files exist: ls packages/observability/infra/slo/
Verify runbook docs exist: ls packages/observability/docs/runbooks/
